documentation.text: @notice Returns total number of certificates registered on this contract.
@notice Returns certificate number at a given index (for enumeration).

devdoc.details: Each certificate is registered once and cannot be modified (immutability)

issueCertificate(string,string,string,st.details: Reverts if the certificateNumber was already registered.

params.certificateNumber: The unique certificate ID to look up.

returns.exists: True if the certificate is registered on-chain
returns.issuedBy: Ethereum address that issued the certificate

verifyCertificate(string).notice: Retrieve certificate data by certificate number.

userdoc.notice: Stores internship certificates on the Ethereum blockchain (Ganache local)
